note: Severe overnight truck parking shortage statewide. Mass Pike (I-90) service plazas are the backbone; the main independent full-service stops are Flynn's Truck Plaza (Shrewsbury, via I-90/I-290 area), Pride Travel Center (Chicopee, Pike Exit 51) and the Whately Diner truck stop on I-91. No truck stops on I-93, I-95, I-195, I-290, I-395 or I-495. Mass Pike and I-91 exits were renumbered to milepost-based in 2020-21; old sequential exits shown where known.

stops.name: Pilot Travel Center
stops.notes: 400 Route 15, just off I-84 near the I-90 interchange; busy, fills early

stops.name: Lee Service Plaza
stops.notes: Westernmost Pike plaza; fuel and food, truck parking

stops.name: Blandford Service Plazas
stops.notes: EB and WB plazas; fuel and food, truck parking

stops.name: Pride Travel Center
stops.notes: Burnett Rd off Exit 51 (I-291); fuel, restaurant, truck parking

stops.name: Ludlow Service Plazas
stops.notes: EB and WB plazas; fuel and food, truck parking

stops.name: Charlton Service Plazas
stops.notes: EB and WB; largest Pike plazas, most truck parking on I-90

stops.name: Flynn's Truck Plaza
stops.notes: 307 Hartford Tpke (US-20), off-Pike via I-290/MA-146 interchange; full-service independent, diner, overnight parking

stops.name: Westborough Service Plaza
stops.notes: Westbound; fuel and food, truck parking

stops.name: Framingham Service Plaza
stops.notes: Eastbound; last plaza before Boston, fuel and food, truck parking

stops.name: Whately Diner / Fillin' Station Truck Stop
stops.notes: US-5/MA-10 between Northampton and Greenfield; 24-hour diner, fuel, truck parking

stops.name: Lexington Rest Area
stops.notes: Southbound on the Route 128 stretch; truck parking, no fuel
